title: PurpleCupa
description: The PurpleCupa is a meticulously curated collection of mods focused on optimizing performance and bringing back Optifine features. With Iris and PlasmoVoice.
body:
The PurpleCupa for version 1.19.4-1.21.1 is a carefully curated collection of mods designed to optimize and enhance the gameplay experience. This compilation focuses on maximizing performance while reintroducing key features from Optifine. Additionally, it includes mods for shader support (Iris) and voice chat functionality (PlasmoVoice). The compilation will be regularly updated to ensure compatibility with future Minecraft versions.

Testing Results:
During testing, the compilation consistently achieved impressive performance results. On a laptop equipped with an Intel i5-9300H processor and a GTX 1650 graphics card, with the ComplementaryReimagined_r2.1 shader pack enabled, the compilation delivered a steady 60-80 frames per second (fps). This is a testament to the optimization efforts and the efficient utilization of system resources.

Moreover, the compilation showcased its capability to deliver exceptional performance even without shader effects. On the same laptop, with the shaders disabled, the compilation yielded a remarkable 100-150 fps. This demonstrates the mod compilation's ability to adapt to different user preferences and hardware configurations while maintaining smooth gameplay.

The inclusion of the Iris mod for shader support allows players to enhance their visual experience by applying a wide range of shaders to create stunning in-game environments. With the easy-to-use shader management provided by the Iris mod, players can explore various visual styles and effects, tailoring the game's aesthetics to their liking.

Additionally, the integration of the PlasmoVoice mod introduces a voice chat feature to facilitate communication among players. This enhances multiplayer experiences by enabling real-time voice communication, fostering collaboration, and enabling quick and efficient coordination within Minecraft gameplay.

The development team is committed to continuously updating the mod compilation to ensure compatibility with future Minecraft versions, as well as incorporating new optimizations and feature enhancements. Players can expect ongoing support and improvements, guaranteeing a seamless and enjoyable Minecraft experience.

Note: The performance results mentioned above are based on testing conducted on a laptop with an Intel i5-9300H processor and a GTX 1650 graphics card. Actual performance may vary depending on individual system configurations and the presence of other resource-intensive mods or external factors.
